title: 30,000 BBY

The following events took place in '''30,000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The Infinite Empire of the Rakata reaches its peak, spanning dozens of worlds across the galaxy. They [[War against Celestial client species|annex]] the holdings of other spacefaring species such as the [[Gree/Legends|Gree]] and the Kwa. {{Circa}}<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
*The Killiks of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] attempt to [[Incursion of Korriban|invade]] the planet [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], but are repelled by the [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]] species. {{Circa}}<ref name="Atlas" />
*The Killiks vanish from Alderaan,<ref name="Atlas" /> [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]]<ref name="Unknown Regions">''[[The Unknown Regions]]''</ref> and the galaxy at large, having been [[Great Migration|relocated]] to the Unknown Regions; modern scholars believe that the [[Celestial/Legends|Celestials]] are responsible. {{Circa}}<ref name="Atlas" />
*The earliest [[Droid/Legends|droids]] developed within the confederacy of worlds later united under the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] are thought to have approximately originated around this year, though are pre-dated by self-aware automata invented by earlier alien civilizations.<ref name="NEGD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

==Deaths==
*[[Unidentified Killik Sith warrior|Killik Sith Lord]] on [[Sarafur]]

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{Mo}}
